eg_entity_outlines.configScreen.title: Entity Selection Outlines Config
eg_entity_outlines.option.outline_block_: Whether outlines should show when looking at block attached entities such as item frames, paintings, cushions, or leash knots
eg_entity_outlines.option.outline_armour: Whether outlines should show when looking at armour stands
Whether outlines should show when looking at boats
eg_entity_outlines.option.outline_mineca: Whether outlines should show when looking at minecarts
eg_entity_outlines.option.outline_end_cr: Whether outlines should show when looking at end crystals
eg_entity_outlines.option.outline_everyt: Should outlines show for every entity? This respects the other options, for example if 'Outline Boats' is disabled and this is enabled, everything except boats will have an outline
